messages.text: Hello! 👋 I’m ClariBot, your AI support assistant. How can I help you today?
How can I contact support?
You can contact our support team by email at support@claribot.com or call us during business hours.
delivery
Thanks for reaching out! I'd be happy to help. Could you share a bit more detail so I can give you the most accurate answer?
refund
Refund requests are reviewed by our support team. Please provide your order details so we can assist you further.
opening hours
Our opening hours are Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. We are closed on weekends and public holidays.

Thanks for reaching out! I'd be happy to help. Could you share a bit more detail so I can give you the most accurate answer?
opening hours
Our opening hours are Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. We are closed on weekends and public holidays. The chatbot is available 24/7 for basic support.
delivery
Yes, we provide digital delivery for chatbot services. After signup, the chatbot can be integrated into the business website. Setup time depends on the selected plan and business requirements.
product

We offer AI customer support products and services:


1. Starter Plan — $0/month
Best for testing. Includes basic chatbot replies, lead capture, and 1,000 monthly conversations.

2. Growth Plan — $99/month
Best for small businesses. Includes 20,000 conversations, admin dashboard, analytics, conversation history, and priority support.

3. Enterprise Plan — $299/month
Best for larger businesses. Includes unlimited conversations, custom AI training, advanced support, SLA support, and white-label option.

4. Custom Chatbot Setup — From $499 one-time
Includes chatbot setup, business FAQ training, support flow setup, and website integration.

5. AI Knowledge Base Setup — From $199 one-time
Includes adding product details, pricing, refund policy, delivery details, opening hours, and business FAQs.
refund

Refund requests are reviewed by our support team. Please provide your registered email, order or plan details, payment date, and reason for refund. If the service has not been used or the issue is valid, the support team may approve a refund according to business policy.
email
You can contact our support team by email at support@claribot.com. Business support is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. You can also continue asking questions here.
Tell me about growth plan

Here is our pricing:


1. Starter Plan — $0/month
Best for testing. Includes basic chatbot replies, lead capture, and 1,000 monthly conversations.

2. Growth Plan — $99/month
Best for small businesses. Includes 20,000 conversations, admin dashboard, analytics, conversation history, and priority support.

3. Enterprise Plan — $299/month
Best for larger businesses. Includes unlimited conversations, custom AI training, advanced support, SLA support, and white-label option.

4. Custom Chatbot Setup — From $499 one-time
Includes chatbot setup, business FAQ training, support flow setup, and website integration.

5. AI Knowledge Base Setup — From $199 one-time
Includes adding product details, pricing, refund policy, delivery details, opening hours, and business FAQs.

For most small businesses, the Growth Plan at $99/month is the best option.

i need further details

ClariBot is an AI customer support platform for business websites. It helps customers ask questions about products, prices, delivery, refunds, opening hours, and support. It includes a business landing page, account registration, ChatGPT-like chatbot UI, lead capture, conversation history, and admin dashboard.
Tell me about Enterprise Plan

Here is our pricing:


1. Starter Plan — $0/month
Best for testing. Includes basic chatbot replies, lead capture, and 1,000 monthly conversations.

2. Growth Plan — $99/month
Best for small businesses. Includes 20,000 conversations, admin dashboard, analytics, conversation history, and priority support.

3. Enterprise Plan — $299/month
Best for larger businesses. Includes unlimited conversations, custom AI training, advanced support, SLA support, and white-label option.

4. Custom Chatbot Setup — From $499 one-time
Includes chatbot setup, business FAQ training, support flow setup, and website integration.

5. AI Knowledge Base Setup — From $199 one-time
Includes adding product details, pricing, refund policy, delivery details, opening hours, and business FAQs.

For most small businesses, the Growth Plan at $99/month is the best option.

Hello! 👋 I’m ClariBot, your AI customer support assistant. You can ask me about products, prices, delivery, refunds, opening hours, or account support.
can I refund?

Refund requests are reviewed by our support team. Please provide your registered email, order or plan details, payment date, and reason for refund. If the service has not been used or the issue is valid, the support team may approve a refund according to business policy.
delivery?
Yes, we provide digital delivery for chatbot services. After signup, the chatbot can be integrated into the business website. Setup time depends on the selected plan and business requirements.

Hello! 👋 I’m ClariBot, your AI customer support assistant. You can ask me about products, prices, delivery, refunds, opening hours, or account support.
delivery
ClariMart offers delivery for grocery orders. Delivery is free for orders over $50. Delivery time and fee may depend on the customer location and order size.
what about product

Here are our available ClariMart products:

1. Premium Pure Tahini 750g — $10.50 | Stock: 25 | Pantry
2. Flower Honey 1kg — $10.00 | Stock: 18 | Breakfast
3. Rose Turkish Delight 250g — $5.00 | Stock: 40 | Sweets
4. Turkish Style Yogurt 2kg — $7.00 | Stock: 12 | Dairy
5. Halal Beef Sucuk 500g — $13.60 | Stock: 9 | Halal Meat
6. Dubai Chocolate — $10.00 | Stock: 15 | Sweets

You can ask me about any product name, price, category or stock.
What offers do you have?

I can help you as a ClariMart shopping assistant. You can ask about product details, prices, stock, halal items, dairy, sweets, breakfast recommendations, delivery, cart, checkout, refunds and opening hours.
What offers do you have?

Current ClariMart offers:

• Free delivery on orders over $50
• Premium Pure Tahini 750g is on sale from $12.50 to $10.50
• Rose Turkish Delight 250g is only $5.00, a budget-friendly sweet option
• Turkish Style Yogurt 2kg is a family-size dairy item for only $7.00
• Halal Beef Sucuk 500g is one of our speciality halal products

You can ask me about any product, and I can explain its price, speciality, best use and stock.
